title: Edgy Foliage
description:
When Blocks are just too blocky:

Grassier Grass Blocks, Leafier Leaves, Plus-shaped Cactus Blocks, cheap Fake-3D Sugar Canes & more.

Great Compatibility.
body:
## 🔔 Now with [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) support!
Only want the grass blocks? Don't change the cacti blocks? Not into the sugar cane? No problem.  
Respackopts adds a way for resource packs to add a config screen in the resource packs menu.  
Simply toggle the features you want or don't want on or off!

# How it works
This resource pack will only ever add custom **models** and **block states**, _no textures_.

![default showcas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c64cf1e78b6d61f01661fc4f33f847996ede1eb.png)

It uses existing textures to subtly change up some environmental **block models** (e.g. grass and cacti).

![Edgy Foliage preview (fading on/off)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/194d76cca6a103d77864aa3b564ca197458b2cd1.gif)

_([sorry for the quality - better check the gallery!](./edgy-foliage/gallery))_

## Credits
Initially inspired by [u/alkalinechaos](https://www.reddit.com/user/alkalinechaos/) and their [original post](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/2mz9m4/custom_grass_block_model_makes_grass_less_blocky/) on reddit.
